landing.headline: Hola, I'm Lola.
landing.sub: Moving to Spain is a hundred small steps — visas, padrón, taxes, healthcare — and they only work in the right order. I've helped others make this move, and I'll walk it with you the whole way.
landing.subQuiet: Answer a few questions and I'll build your personal roadmap: real steps, real deadlines, nothing you don't need.

done: That's everything I need — your roadmap is ready.

fallback.question: Could you tell me about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyReask: Could you tell me a little more about {{hint}}?
fallback.clarifyPrefix: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. {{reask}}
fallback.turnFailed: Sorry — that took longer than it should have. Your answer is still in the box; mind sending it again?

static.nationalities: Quick one — where's everyone in the household a citizen?
static.work_situation: Work-wise, when you move — will you be working remotely, freelancing, studying, retired, or something else?
static.employer_country_is_foreign: Is your employer based outside Spain?
static.annual_income_eur_band: To find the right visa, I need a rough sense of your annual household income. Which band fits?
static.has_spouse_or_partner: Will a spouse or partner be making this move with you?
static.partner_is_married: Are you two legally married or in a registered civil partnership?
static.intends_long_stay: Is this a proper long-term move — more than six months a year — or more of an extended stay?
static.arrival_date: Roughly when are you hoping to arrive? Even just a month is fine.
static.has_spanish_address: Do you already have a place lined up, rented or owned?
static.owns_or_drives: Will anyone be driving while you're there?
static.owns_property_in_spain: Are you planning to buy property in Spain, or have you already bought?
static.region: Which part of Spain will you be settling in? A comunidad — or just name the city and I'll place it.
static.has_pets: Any pets making this move with you?
static.foreign_assets_eur_band: Slightly personal — and you only pick a range — roughly how much do you hold outside Spain?
static.us_resident: Are you currently based in the US? (Consulate wait times are quite long right now.)
static.previously_ex_spanish_colony_nationality: Are you a national of a former Spanish colony — most of Latin America, or the Philippines?
